NEOW.talk.FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARAC: [sine]Go... build your character from this template...[/sine]
DARV.talk.FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARAC: Empty is useful! Take something and fill it in!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIY: 这里就是我的终点了吗？
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.title: Feiyap
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.pages.INITIA: Before the fractured star trails, the Star-Slayer waits for visitors at the observatory.
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.talk.firstVi:
The star trails fracture here.
You have stepped onto my observatory—do not look up. Falling shards will cut open undecided fates.
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.talk.ANY.0-0: You return. The chart is unchanged; only the footsteps upon it differ.
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.talk.ANY.1-0: Light cannot escape gravity, and neither can you. Choose something to carry you onward.
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.talk.FEIYAP_: A kin of golden eyes... no, myself from another worldline. Are you also searching for an end?
Across parallel worlds, I have felled countless stars. If you still press onward—even light cannot escape my grasp. What chance have you?
Your end is not yet written in the almanac. When you return, I will keep a lamp that does not go out.
Take this. Not charity—a weight lent to you from another worldline.
Good. Remember—only after stars fall can the true road be seen.
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.talk.IRONCLA: Warrior, your fury is like a supernova. Bright, but it can burn the hand that wields the blade.
You return. The embers are not cold—do not hurry to burn everything to ash.
Choose one. Gravity will hold the obsessions that refuse to sink.
...I only need something I can swing.
Then take it. Do not let your flame die before your will does.
Hunter, your steps are light—too light for starlight to record.
Silence is fine. The cosmos was born in stillness.
Choose one. Do not ask its name—names do not linger in stardust.
Go. The sharpest blade often makes no sound.
Construct... your core frequency is steady, like a pulsar.
<steady beeping>... I hear you. Signals cross the dark as well.
Choose one. Treat it as a counterweight to calibrate your orbit.
Go. Do not let any gravity pull your rhythm off course.
FEIYAP_EVENT_ZHAN_XING_GUAN.talk.NECROBI: Madam, hatred is gravity too. It drags everything toward the same abyss.
You have not let go. Good—vengeance also needs an orbit.
Choose one. Let its weight remember the starlit nights still unsettled.
Then carry it. Light at a black hole's edge is often the brightest.
Your Highness, a crown weighs as much as a star. Can you bear it?
Welcome back. Today's stars still lean toward you—but leaning is not falling.
Choose one. Authority needs substance to pin down wild comets.
...I shall not fail the stars' expectation.
Good. To rule the stars, one must first learn to dwell with the dark.
